xmldoc.message:
Warning: No OpenAI API key configured.
Configure AI generation with environment variables:
  OPENAI_API_KEY - Your OpenAI API key
  OPENAI_BASE_URL - (Optional) Base URL for Azure OpenAI or compatible APIs
  OPENAI_MODEL - (Optional) Model to use (default: gpt-4o)
Or save them with: difflog config --api-key <KEY> --base-url <URL> --model 
<MODEL>
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<Model>
  <!--CONFIG-->
  <Command Name="config" IsBranch="false" 
ClrType="DiffLog.Commands.ConfigCommand" 
Settings="DiffLog.Commands.ConfigSettings">
    <Description>Store OpenAI configuration values for future 
runs.</Description>
    <Parameters>
      <Option Short="" Long="api-key" Value="KEY" Required="false" Kind="scalar"
ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>OpenAI API key to store.</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="audience" Value="AUDIENCE" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.Nullable`1[[DiffLog.Models.Audience, DiffLog, 
Version=0.0.2.0, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=null]]">
        <Description>Audience to set a custom system prompt for.</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="base-url" Value="URL" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Base URL for OpenAI-compatible API.</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="i" Long="interactive" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Prompt for missing values.</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="model" Value="MODEL" Required="false" Kind="scalar"
ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Model to use for generation.</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="system-prompt" Value="PROMPT" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Custom system prompt to store for the 
audience.</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="system-prompt-file" Value="FILE" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Path to a file containing the system prompt.</Description>
      </Option>
    </Parameters>
    <Examples>
      <Example commandLine="config" />
      <Example commandLine="--api-key" />
      <Example commandLine="sk-..." />
      <Example commandLine="--model" />
      <Example commandLine="gpt-4o" />
      <Example commandLine="config" />
      <Example commandLine="--interactive" />
    </Examples>
  </Command>
  <!--GENERATE-->
  <Command Name="generate" IsBranch="false" 
ClrType="DiffLog.Commands.GenerateCommand" 
Settings="DiffLog.Commands.GenerateSettings">
    <Description>Generate release notes from git history.</Description>
    <Parameters>
      <Option Short="a" Long="audience" Value="AUDIENCE" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="DiffLog.Models.Audience">
        <Description>Target audience: Developers, EndUsers, SocialMedia, or 
Executive.</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="exclude" Value="CATEGORIES" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Comma-separated list of categories to 
exclude.</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="format" Value="FORMAT" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="DiffLog.Models.OutputFormat">
        <Description>Output format: Markdown, Html, PlainText, or 
Json.</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="f" Long="from" Value="REF" Required="false" Kind="scalar" 
ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Starting reference (tag, branch, or commit). If not 
specified, includes all commits up to --to.</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="from-date" Value="DATE" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Include commits from this date (yyyy-MM-dd).</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="i" Long="interactive" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Run in interactive mode with prompts.</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="no-contributors" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Exclude contributor list.</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="no-links" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="flag"
ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Exclude links to issues and PRs.</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="o" Long="output" Value="FILE" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Output file path. Defaults to a generated file in the 
repository.</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="p" Long="path" Value="PATH" Required="false" Kind="scalar" 
ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Path to the git repository. Defaults to current 
directory.</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="print" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="flag" 
ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Also print the generated release notes to the 
console.</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="repo-url" Value="URL" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Repository URL for generating links (auto-detected if not 
specified).</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="system-prompt" Value="PROMPT" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Override the system prompt for this run.</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="system-prompt-file" Value="FILE" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Path to a file containing a system prompt 
override.</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="t" Long="to" Value="REF" Required="false" Kind="scalar" 
ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Ending reference (tag, branch, or commit). Defaults to 
HEAD.</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="to-date" Value="DATE" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Include commits until this date (yyyy-MM-dd).</Description>
      </Option>
    </Parameters>
    <Examples>
      <Example commandLine="generate" />
      <Example commandLine="generate" />
      <Example commandLine="--from" />
      <Example commandLine="v1.0.0" />
      <Example commandLine="--to" />
      <Example commandLine="v2.0.0" />
      <Example commandLine="generate" />
      <Example commandLine="-a" />
      <Example commandLine="EndUsers" />
      <Example commandLine="--format" />
      <Example commandLine="Html" />
      <Example commandLine="generate" />
      <Example commandLine="-i" />
    </Examples>
  </Command>
  <!--TAGS-->
  <Command Name="tags" IsBranch="false" ClrType="DiffLog.Commands.TagsCommand" 
Settings="DiffLog.Commands.TagsSettings">
    <Description>List available tags in the repository.</Description>
    <Parameters>
      <Option Short="p" Long="path" Value="PATH" Required="false" Kind="scalar" 
ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Path to the git repository. Defaults to current 
directory.</Description>
      </Option>
    </Parameters>
  </Command>
</Model>

install.stdout:
You can invoke the tool using the following command: difflog
Tool 'difflog' (version '0.0.2') was successfully installed.
